headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk/opportunity (liquidity-driven valuation swing) — YES Bank's inclusion in Nifty Bank set to boost liquidity and ETF inflows, enhancing market visibility
what_matters: Possible minor P/E expansion; no immediate margin or revenue impact.
Triggers BRSR, GRI, and DJSI frameworks; no new regulatory deadlines or penalties.
Potential for slight reduction in cost of capital as passive funds increase holdings.
